ul.li: Sector Alignment: All writes performed at 4KB page boundaries.
Barrier Semantics: fsync() must return 0 before sequence increment is considered durable.
Header Safety: Double-buffered header write is recommended to prevent corruption during power loss.
Recovery Logic: Recovery starts at tail. Since tail == head, recovery scans 0 blocks.

g.text: 1. DATA BARRIER: Wait for Inode/Bitmap I/O to hit main storage.
4. RECALC CRC: Compute parity for new header state.
5. COMMIT: pwrite() memory->buffer to Disk LBA 0.
